product_overview: Trendyol is a Next.js frontend for product profitability analysis and product management with Supabase-backed auth, real-time notifications, CSV bulk import and visual dashboards for KPIs.
core_goals: Allow users to securely sign up and sign in to access analysis and product features.
Provide a guided product profit & risk calculator with persistent storage and detailed analysis views.
Surface real-time persistent notifications on the dashboard and let users manage/read them.
Support CSV bulk import of product data (file upload or pasted text) with preview and validation.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Sign in and sign up using Supabase Auth to access protected routes like the dashboard and analysis pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Ensure Login tab is selected -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Click submit button -> See /dashboard (authenticated user redirected to /dashboard)
Navigate to /auth -> Toggle between Login and Register -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Click submit button -> See account created confirmation -> Redirected to /dashboard
Navigate to /auth -> Enter email -> Enter password (incorrect) -> Click submit button -> See error message 'Invalid credentials' -> Remain on /auth

features.name: Product Profit Analysis
features.description: Create a new product analysis to calculate net profit and risk; save analyses for later review in a detailed view.
user_flows: Navigate to /analysis/new -> Select marketplace -> Enter product cost -> Enter sale price -> Enter shipping cost -> Click calculate -> See calculated net profit and risk assessment on the page -> Click save -> Redirected to /analysis/[id] showing detailed analysis

Navigate to /analysis/new -> Select marketplace -> Enter sale price but leave cost blank -> Click calculate -> See validation error 'Cost is required' next to cost field -> Enter product cost -> Click calculate -> See updated results

features.name: Persistent Notifications
features.description: Show real-time alerts stored in Supabase on the dashboard; allow viewing, filtering and marking notifications as read.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click notification bell -> See notification drawer open with list of notifications -> Receive real-time notification -> See new notification appear in the drawer -> Filter notifications by Unread -> Click 'Mark as read' on a notification -> Unread count decreases

Navigate to /dashboard -> Click notification bell -> See loading indicator -> Network request to fetch notifications fails -> See error message 'Unable to load notifications' -> Click retry -> See notifications load successfully

features.name: CSV Bulk Import
features.description: Import product data into the Products list via CSV file upload or pasted CSV text with preview, mapping and confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> Click CSV Upload -> Choose CSV file to upload -> See data preview modal with parsed rows -> Map columns if required -> Click Confirm import -> See success message -> See imported products listed on /products
Navigate to /products -> Click CSV Upload -> Paste CSV text into paste area -> See parsed preview -> Click Confirm import -> See imported products listed on /products
Navigate to /products -> Click CSV Upload -> Upload malformed CSV file -> See preview modal with parsing errors highlighted and error messages -> Click Cancel -> Remain on /products

routes.description: Main dashboard with KPIs and charts
Product analyses list and CSV import
